title: Playbook Execution Engine — LLM Step Evaluation & Event Trigger Wiring
description: playbook_engine.py has a sophisticated 8-step type FSM (CONDITION, ACTION, NOTIFICATION, APPROVAL, DELAY, LOOP, PARALLEL, LLM_EVALUATE) backed by SQLite, and compliance_templates.py provides 7-framework control libraries. However LLM_EVALUATE steps call a stub rather than the real LLM Council, PARALLEL step execution is synchronous under threading.Thread without back-pressure, and the event-trigger integration (EventBus → playbook trigger) is not wired.
missing: Wire LLM_EVALUATE step type to the real Karpathy LLM Council (core/llm_council.py) with prompt templating and confidence thresholds
Implement true async PARALLEL step execution using asyncio.gather with configurable concurrency limit and timeout cancellation
Wire EventBus subscription so incoming high-severity events automatically trigger matching playbooks based on event_type and severity filters
